summary: Identified an observability gap in request log correlation. Route-level and database logs use the global logger directly instead of request-scoped logger context, losing request_id mapping. Proposed migrating to structlog.contextvars to ensure context propagation.
evidence: Student identified request_id as the correlation field.
Student diagnosed that route-level logs (cache invalidation, cache hits) lack request_id because they call the global logger directly instead of the bound request_logger.
Student proposed using structlog.contextvars to automatically inject the request correlation ID into all logs emitted during a request's execution lifecycle.
